name: Cyber Attack
text1: Hackers breached treaty monitoring infrastructure. Inspection schedules and facility data were exfiltrated. Several facilities received advance warning of upcoming inspections.
text2: An AI system attacked treaty monitoring systems, discovering and exploiting vulnerabilities faster than human defenders could respond. Monitoring capabilities are degraded across multiple regions.
image-prompt: A network operations center with alarms flashing red as screens show cascading system failures propagating across a global monitoring map, operators scrambling at consoles, darkness closing in from the edges of the room, digital painting, no text
